name: Borscht
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans in cold water for two hours, drain, and add more cold water to cover. Simmer until tender, about two hours.
2. Place spareribs in a large pot of cold water. Bring to boil, skim off any surface scum, and simmer for about 20 minutes. Remove meat with a slotted spoon and return it to the pot.
3. Add beets, onion, and salt. Simmer until meat is cooked, about 45 more minutes.
4. Add cooked beans, cabbage, and flour. Cook until cabbage is tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Blend cream and remaining ingredients into soup. Stir continuously until soup thickens slightly.
6. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice to taste. Serve hot with sour cream and dill.
